'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade''''' was the eighth story-arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics, and the third of the "[[Rise of Isard]]" arc. It ran from [[March 4]] to [[July 1]], [[1998]].
